title: MedFamily
shortDescription: A mobile-first healthcare PWA for family medical records, prescriptions, reminders, appointments, and medicine orders.
longDescription: MedFamily is a mobile-first healthcare management Progressive Web App built as an SEPM project. It helps patients, families, caretakers, doctors, hospitals, and chemists manage records, prescriptions, reminders, appointments, medicine ordering, controlled access, emergency summaries, and notifications in one place.
